mapper.select: SELECT id, species, sex, birth_date, health_condition, arrival_date, status, notes, created_at, updated_at FROM hamsters WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT DISTINCT species FROM hamsters WHERE species IS NOT NULL AND species != '' ORDER BY species ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hamsters ( species, sex, birth_date, health_condition, arrival_date, status, notes, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{species}, #{sex, typeHandler=com.ishijima.portfoliobackend.typehandler.HamsterSexTypeHandler}, #{birthDate}, #{healthCondition}, #{arrivalDate}, #{status, typeHandler=com.ishijima.portfoliobackend.typehandler.HamsterStatusTypeHandler}, #{notes}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE hamsters SET species = #{species}, sex = #{sex, typeHandler=com.ishijima.portfoliobackend.typehandler.HamsterSexTypeHandler}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, health_condition = #{healthCondition}, arrival_date = #{arrivalDate}, status = #{status, typeHandler=com.ishijima.portfoliobackend.typehandler.HamsterStatusTypeHandler}, notes = #{notes}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
